# Virtual file system implementation (2026-03-13 05:43Z)

_**User**_

Implement Task 9 from docs/plans/2026-03-13-dev-shell-impl-plan.md.

**Task 9: 虚拟 FS — read_file, list_dir, set_cwd**

1. In src/vfs.rs impl Vfs add:

   pub fn read_file(&self, path: &str) -> Result<Vec<u8>, ()> {
       let abs = self.resolve_to_absolute(path);
       let n = self.resolve_absolute(&abs)?;
       match n { Node::File { content, .. } => Ok(content.clone()), _ => Err(()) }
   }

   pub fn list_dir(&self, path: &str) -> Result<Vec<String>, ()> {
       let abs = self.resolve_to_absolute(path);
       let n = self.resolve_absolute(&abs)?;
       match n { Node::Dir { children, .. } => Ok(children.iter().map(|c| c.name().to_string()).collect()), _ => Err(()) }
   }

   pub fn set_cwd(&mut self, path: &str) -> Result<(), ()> {
       let abs = self.resolve_to_absolute(path);
       let n = self.resolve_absolute(&abs)?;
       if !n.is_dir() { return Err(()); }
       self.cwd = if abs == "/" { "/".to_string() } else { abs };
       Ok(())
   }

2. Run cargo test. Commit: git add src/vfs.rs && git commit -m "feat(vfs): read_file, list_dir, set_cwd"

Work directory: /home/ars/richard/2026/pvm_2/dev_shell
